title: Tick Control Long Beach | Tick Extermination Services Long Island
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Long Beach, NY. Protect your family & pets from Lyme disease with expert tick extermination. $125-$325. Call today!
intro: Long Beach residents enjoy beautiful oceanfront living, but the proximity to beaches, parks, and natural areas also means exposure to ticks that carry Lyme disease and other illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Long Beach, from the boardwalk neighborhoods to the bay-side communities. Our targeted treatments protect your family, pets, and outdoor spaces from dangerous tick populations year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Long Beach and Long Island communities for years with specialized tick control solutions tailored to coastal environments. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks from your yard, garden, and outdoor living areas.
localContext: Long Beach's unique coastal setting, with its barrier island location between the Atlantic Ocean and Reynolds Channel, creates ideal habitats for ticks in residential yards, the Kennedy Plaza area, and near Martin Luther King Jr. Park. Homes with beachfront access, landscaped gardens, and proximity to natural vegetation require professional tick prevention to ensure safe outdoor enjoyment throughout the summer season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Long Beach, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Long Beach typically runs from April through November, with peak activity during the warm summer months. However, ticks can be active year-round during mild winters, making seasonal treatments essential for complete protection.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Long Beach?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Long Beach range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages with multiple applications for ongoing protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and allowing the treatment to dry completely (typically 2-4 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities.

faqs.question: What areas of my Long Beach property should be treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: We focus on high-risk areas including tall grass, wooded borders, leaf litter, shrubs, gardens, and transition zones between lawn and natural vegetation. Special attention is given to children's play areas, pet runs, and outdoor entertaining spaces where your family spends the most time.
